001
WOIN90 VOMM 010300 
FROM: ACWC CHENNAI
TO:	AMSS CHENNAI / ALL CONCERNED 			
CHENNAI MORNING INFERENCE ISSUED AT 1330 HRS IST ON 01.05.2026
	
BAY INFERENCE
Weather seasonal over Bay of Bengal and Andaman Sea.





ARABIAN SEA INFERENCE

Weather seasonal over Arabian Sea.






REGIONAL INFERENCE
Yesterdayĺs trough/ wind discontinuity from South Interior Karnataka
to Gulf of Mannar now runs from South Odisha to Gulf of Mannar
across Telangana, Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu upto 1.5 km above
mean sea level.

Bidar (North Interior Karnataka) and Jangamaheswarapuram (Coastal
Andhra Pradesh) recorded the highest maximum temperature of 44.0░C
over the plains in the region.











RAINFALL FORECAST FOR NEXT 7 DAYS

	(01.05.2026)	(02.05.2026)	(03.05.2026)	(04.05.2026)	(05.05.2026)	(0
6.05.2026)	(07.05.2026)
Tamilnadu,
PDC & KKL	SCT	SCT	ISOL	SCT	ISOL	ISOL	ISOL

HEAVY RAINFALL WARNING
Day 1 (01.05.2026)	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places
over Nilgiris, Coimbatore, Tiruppur, Theni, Erode and Dindigul
districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
Day 2 (02.05.2026)
	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places over Nilgiris,
Coimbatore, Tiruppur, Theni, Erode, Salem, Namakkal and Dindigul
districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
Day 3 (03.05.2026)	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places
over Nilgiris, Ghat areas of Coimbatore, Ghat areas of Tiruppur,
Theni and Dindigul districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
Day 4 (04.05.2026)
	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places over Nilgiris,
Ghat areas of Coimbatore, Erode, Salem, Namakkal and Tiruchirappalli
districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.

Day 1 (01.05.2026)	Ľ	Thunderstorm & lightning with gusty winds speed
reaching 50-60 kmph is likely to occur at one or two places over
Coastal Andhra Pradesh.

kmph is likely to occur at one or two places over Tamil Nadu,
Puducherry & Karaikal area, Kerala, and Rayalaseema.

kmph is likely to occur at one or two places over North Interior
Karnataka, South Interior Karnataka, Telangana and Lakshadweep
area.

over Coastal Karnataka.

Pradesh.

Karnataka, South Interior Karnataka, Rayalaseema and Telangana.

over Coastal Karnataka.
Day 3 (03.05.2026)

kmph is likely to occur at one or two places over Tamil Nadu,

TEMPERATURE WARNING
Day 1 (01.05.2026)
&
Day 2 (02.05.2026)	Due to high maximum temperature, combined with
high humidity is likely to cause discomfort over Coastal areas of
Tamil Nadu, Puducherry & Karaikal area, Coastal Karnataka, and
Coastal Andhra Pradesh.

Day 3 (03.05.2026)
	Due to high maximum temperature, combined with high humidity is
likely to cause discomfort over Coastal areas of Tamil Nadu,
Puducherry & Karaikal area and Coastal Andhra Pradesh.
Day 4 (04.05.2026)
&
Day 5 (05.05.2026)	Due to high maximum temperature, combined with
high humidity is likely to cause discomfort over Coastal areas of
Tamil Nadu, Puducherry & Karaikal area.















MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE FORECAST
MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE:
Tendency:
Ľ	No large change with rising tendency in Maximum temperatures
during Day 1 (01.05.2026) to Day 5 (05.05.2026) over Tamil Nadu,
Puducherry and Karaikal area.
Ľ	No Large Change in Maximum temperature during Day 1 (01.05.2026)
to Day 3 (03.05.2026) over Telangana, during Day 1 (01.05.2026) to
Day 5 (05.05.2026) over Kerala, Karnataka and during Day 1
(01.05.2026) to Day 7 (07.05.2026) over Coastal Andhra Pradesh and
Rayalaseema.
Departure from Normal:
Ľ	Maximum temperatures likely to be above normal by 2-3░C at a few
pockets during Day 1 (01.05.2026) to Day 5 (05.05.2026) over Tamil
Nadu, Puducherry and Karaikal area.

Weather seasonal over Bay of Bengal and Andaman Sea.





ARABIAN SEA INFERENCE

Weather seasonal over Arabian Sea.






REGIONAL INFERENCE
Morningĺs trough/ wind discontinuity from South Odisha to Gulf of
Mannar across Telangana, Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu extending
upto 1.5 km above mean sea level persists.

HEAVY RAINFALL WARNING
Day 1 (01.05.2026)	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places
over Nilgiris, Coimbatore, Tiruppur, Theni, Erode and Dindigul
districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
Day 2 (02.05.2026)
	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places over Nilgiris,
Coimbatore, Tiruppur, Theni, Erode, Salem, Namakkal and Dindigul
districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
Day 3 (03.05.2026)	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places
over Nilgiris, Ghat areas of Coimbatore, Ghat areas of Tiruppur,
Theni and Dindigul districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
Day 4 (04.05.2026)
	Heavy rain is likely to occur at isolated places over Nilgiris,
Ghat areas of Coimbatore, Erode, Salem, Namakkal and Tiruchirappalli
districts of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.

MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE FORECAST
MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE:
Tendency:

during Day 1 (01.05.2026) to Day 5 (05.05.2026) over Tamil Nadu,
Puducherry and Karaikal area.

to Day 3 (03.05.2026) over Telangana, during Day 1 (01.05.2026) to
Day 5 (05.05.2026) over Kerala, Karnataka and during Day 1
(01.05.2026) to Day 7 (07.05.2026) over Coastal Andhra Pradesh and
Rayalaseema.
Departure from Normal:
Ľ	Maximum temperatures likely to be above normal by 2-3░C at a few
pockets during Day 1 (01.05.2026) to Day 5 (05.05.2026) over Tamil
Nadu, Puducherry and Karaikal area.
